title: Infinite loop in pagination with Agendor API
symptom: The HTTP Request node continues to execute indefinitely when trying to paginate through results from the Agendor API.
applies_when: Pagination mode set to 'Response Contains Next URL'
not_this_if: Pagination is correctly configured to stop when no next link exists
root_cause: The pagination settings are incorrectly configured. The condition to stop pagination is based on the presence of a next link, but the response still contains data even when there is no next link, leading to an infinite loop.
fix_steps: Change the pagination complete condition to check for the absence of the next link using the expression !$response?.body?.links?.next.
Save the changes and re-run the workflow.
agent_instruction: Update the pagination complete condition to check for the absence of the next link.
